caveats: We only show a connection to homeowner parent concerns when a candidate's own recorded background in our data set names it directly (for example, a farming or small-business background). Where no such record exists, we say so rather than guess at a candidate's likely position.
summary: For a homeowner parent voter looking at the Attorney General of Texas race (Mayes Middleton, Nathan Johnson, Tom Oxford): our data set does not contain candidate-specific positions or voting records on property taxes or public school funding for this race. Below is what we do have on each candidate's background and, where available, campaign finance.
